summary: Iteration 47: Comprehensive testing of Google Sheets admin and agency integration features. All backend APIs working correctly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI verified for admin Portfolio Sync page and Agency Hotels page. Route alias /app/admin/google-sheets → /app/admin/portfolio-sync works correctly. Connect wizard with writeback tab field, sync actions, and not_configured graceful degradation all verified.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/sheets/config returns 200 with configured=false (graceful degradation)
GET /api/admin/sheets/connections returns 200 with 4 connections
GET /api/admin/sheets/status returns 200 with dashboard stats
POST /api/admin/sheets/sync/{hotel_id} returns not_configured when no credentials
GET /api/admin/sheets/templates returns 200 with checklist and downloadable_templates
GET /api/admin/sheets/writeback/stats returns 200
GET /api/admin/sheets/runs returns 200
GET /api/admin/sheets/available-hotels returns 200 with 4 hotels
GET /api/agency/hotels returns 200 with 7 hotels including sheet_managed_inventory fields
GET /api/admin/sheets/agency-connections returns 200
Admin /app/admin/google-sheets alias redirects to /app/admin/portfolio-sync
Admin Portfolio Sync page loads with title, subtitle, config banner
Admin page shows 'Google Sheets Yapilandirilmamis' not-configured banner
Admin page shows refresh button and new connection button with data-testids
Admin connections table displays 4 connections with sync toggle/run/runs/delete buttons
Connect wizard opens with 3 steps: hotel select, sheet info (with writeback tab), settings
Connect wizard Step 1: hotel search input and 4 hotels available
Connect wizard Step 2: Sheet ID, Sheet Tab, Writeback Tab inputs
Connect wizard Step 3: auto sync toggle and interval select
Manual sync shows toast feedback: 'Google Sheets yapilandirilmamis. Service Account JSON gerekli.'
Agency Hotels page loads with 7 hotels
Agency hotel cards have data-testid attributes: card, name, status, location
Agency hotel cards have action buttons: create booking, bookings, detail
Agency hotels API returns sheet-related fields (sheet_managed_inventory, allocation_available, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: All sheet-related endpoints return proper graceful degradation payloads when Google credentials not configured
Agency hotels endpoint correctly includes sheet sync fields in response payload
Frontend components properly use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Connect wizard has all 3 steps working with proper field validation
Route alias implementation works correctly via React Router Navigate component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 verified Google Sheets admin page route alias (/app/admin/google-sheets → /app/admin/portfolio-sync), connect wizard with writeback tab field, sync actions with not_configured toast feedback, and agency hotels page with sheet-related data-testids. Service account is NOT configured - all tests verified graceful not-configured behavior. Hotels currently have sheet_managed_inventory=False so sheet badges don't appear on agency hotels page (correct behavior). 14 backend API tests pass.

mocked_apis.note: Google Sheets API not configured - integration shows graceful degradation with proper user feedback
